heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3058a Authorization of appropriations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3058a, , as added , , , related to statement of purposes, prior to repeal by , title VIII, § 701(a), (b), , , 983, effective , with certain exceptions.Pub. L. 89–73, title VII, § 703Pub. L. 98–459, title VII, § 70198 Stat. 1789Pub. L. 100–175, title I, § 181101 Stat. 964Oct. 9, 1984Nov. 29, 1987Oct. 1, 1987A prior was classified to prior to repeal by .section 702 of Pub. L. 89–73section 3045a of this titlePub. L. 95–478

Amendments2020— added subsecs. (a) and (b) and struck out former subsecs. (a) and (b) which related to authorization of appropriations to carry out subparts II to IV of this part for fiscal years 2017 to 2019.Pub. L. 116–1312016—Subsec. (a). , which directed substitution of “$16,280,630 for fiscal year 2017, $16,621,101 for fiscal year 2018, and $16,961,573 for fiscal year 2019.” for “such sums” and all that followed through the period at the end, was executed by making the substitution for “such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2007, and such sums as may be necessary for subsequent fiscal years.” to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 114–144, § 8(a)(1)Subsec. (b). , added subsec. (b) and struck out former subsec. (b). Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out subpart III of this part, such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2007, and such sums as may be necessary for subsequent fiscal years.”Pub. L. 114–144, § 8(a)(2)Subsec. (c). , struck out subsec. (c). Text read as follows: “There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out subpart IV of this part, such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2007, and such sums as may be necessary for subsequent fiscal years.”Pub. L. 114–144, § 8(a)(3)2006— substituted “2007” for “2001” in subsecs. (a) to (c).Pub. L. 109–3652000— amended section catchline and text generally, substituting provisions authorizing appropriations for subparts II, III, and IV of this part for fiscal year 2001 and subsequent fiscal years for provisions authorizing appropriations for subparts II, III, IV, and V of this part for fiscal years 1992 through 1995.Pub. L. 106–501
Effective DateSubchapter inapplicable with respect to fiscal year 1992, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1992 Amendment note under .section 905(b)(6) of Pub. L. 102–375section 3001 of this title

children.heading: Ombudsman program
children.label: a Ombudsman program
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out subpart II, $18,066,950 for fiscal year 2020, $19,150,967 for fiscal year 2021, $20,300,025 for fiscal year 2022, $21,518,027 for fiscal year 2023, and $22,809,108 for fiscal year 2024.

children.heading: Other programs
children.label: b Other programs
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out subparts III and IV, $5,107,110 for fiscal year 2020, $5,413,537 for fiscal year 2021, $5,738,349 for fiscal year 2022, $6,082,650 for fiscal year 2023, and $6,447,609 for fiscal year 2024.
